positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial mountain range at sunset. The mountains are rendered in clean, bold silhouettes of deep indigo and slate gray, contrasted against a vibrant gradient sky of burnt orange, gold, and soft lavender. Scattered across the sky are stylized geometric constellations and crescent moons, done with clean white linework and dot art. The composition is centered, creating a powerful, symmetrical focal point suitable for a T-shirt print. Clean vector lines, high contrast, deep saturation, ethereal glow, nature illustration, cosmic wanderlust aesthetic, perfect for apparel print, solid background.
